title: 手入れの緩みは気の緩み

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
My toes feel so weird when I walk... Maybe I
haven't been taking good enough care of my
nails.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, could this be considered slacking off?!
Ngh! This is so irritating!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory ends up feeling rather
uncomfortable all day due to poor nail care.
